user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of attendance notification templates with their type and description, so that I know which in-app notifications exist
acceptance_criteria: Given attendance notification templates exist; When I open the Notification Templates screen; Then each template is listed with its notification type and description

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the details of an individual notification template, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given a notification template is listed; When I click View for that template; Then its details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the notification templates list, so that I always see the latest templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
